data.title: demo: Workers AI — hello world inference
data.description:
## Goal

Educational hello-world demo for Cloudflare Workers AI.

## What to implement

* `POST /ask` sends a prompt to `@cf/meta/llama-3-8b-instruct` via the `env.AI` binding
* Returns the streamed text response
* `wrangler.jsonc` with `[ai]` binding

## Verify

```sh
curl -X POST https://<worker>.workers.dev/ask -d '{"prompt":"say hello world"}'
```

## Repo

`skogai/cloudflare` — folder: `demos/workers-ai-hello`
